hooks.command:

  Service Agent Session

' && SERVICE_NAME=$(jq -r '.name // "unknown"' .tenet/config.json 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') && echo "  Service: $SERVICE_NAME" && echo '' && if [ -f .tenet/status.json ]; then echo 'Status:' && cat .tenet/status.json | jq -r '"  " + (.status // "unknown")'; fi && echo '

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
' && if command -v tenet >/dev/null 2>&1; then tenet services validate 2>&1 | grep -E '^\[|^Summary:' || echo '  (validation skipped - tenet not in PATH)'; else echo '  (validation skipped - tenet not installed)'; fi && echo '

'

SESSION=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'main') && if [ -d .tenet/journal ] && [ $(ls -1 .tenet/journal/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | wc -l) -eq 0 ]; then echo 'вљ пёЏ  WARNING: No journal entry for this session. Service work should be documented.'; fi && if [ -f .tenet/status.json ]; then jq --arg ts "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.000Z)" '.last_updated = $ts' .tenet/status.json > .tenet/status.json.tmp && mv .tenet/status.json.tmp .tenet/status.json; fi
